name: Eat's California Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove skin and bones from chicken; slice into 1-inch thick pieces.
2. Heat clarified butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Add chicken slices and sauté for 3-5 minutes until they begin to brown.
4. Season the chicken with salt and pepper.
5. Preheat oven to 350°F.
6. Peel, pit, and thinly slice avocados.
7. Cut tomatoes into thin wedges.
8. In a medium casserole dish, layer the chicken, avocado slices, and tomato wedges.
9. Pour white sauce over the top and sprinkle with shredded Monterey Jack cheese.
10. Bake for 30 minutes.
